name: Tailscale Stale Active Accounts (180 days)
description: Detects long-dormant active tailscale accounts with no recent login activity for 180 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_seen AS last_login FROM tailscale_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (u.last_seen IS NULL OR u.last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Immediately disable long-dormant accounts and require formal reactivation approval for reinstatement.
